EF1 TORNADO WITH ESTIMATED MAXIMUM WINDS OF 90 MPH BRIEFLY TOUCHED DOWN ALONG OHIO 124. PATH LENGTH WAS 0.25 MILES AND WIDTH 125 YARDS AT MAXIMUM. A NEW DOUBLE-WIDE MOBILE HOME WAS SHIFTED OFF THE BLOCK FOUNDATION AND TURNED IN A WESTERLY DIRECTION. NEARBY, A GARAGE WAS DESTROYED. ANOTHER NEARBY MOBILE HOME WAS BLOWN A FEW FEET OFF IT'S FOUNDATION IN A SOUTHERLY DIRECTION. CLEAR ROTATION WAS ALSO EVIDENT IN THE DIRECTION SEVERAL UPROOTED TREES WERE LAYING AND IN DEBRIS FIELD.
